title: Cobblemon Brendons Bottlecaps (Cobblemon 1.6 Only)
description: Adds Gold and Silver bottlecaps to cobblemon!
body:
### Don't use with Cobblemon Utility+

## Bottlecap Items (IV Boosters):
**Golden Cap - Boosts all IVs to max**

**Silver Caps - Boosts particular IV to max**

**Wooden Cap - Randomizes IVs**

**Void Cap - Sets IVs to 0**

Available for Minecraft 1.21.1 and Cobblemon 1.6

Recipes are in the Gallery
